case_title: ANDREE NG VS. PANKAJ CHOPRA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY NG, ANDREE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, PANKAJ CHOPRA, KUNAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG, ANDREE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHOPRA, PANKAJ CHOPRA, KUNAL THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANTS WERE NOT ENTITLED TO RECOVER THE COMPENSATION PAID TO DATE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-11-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, KUNAL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JAN-11-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOPRA, PANKAJ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-01-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH DEFENDANT AND CO-DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
